signal.title: Import AI 451: Political superintelligence; Google's society of minds, and a robot drummer
signal.reason: The headline offers high signal value for sophisticated investors. 'Political superintelligence' indicates crucial regulatory and geopolitical discussions impacting AI investment. 'Google's society of minds' points to strategic research directions from a major player, relevant to models and architectural trends. The 'robot drummer' is less impactful but doesn't diminish the strong relevance of the other two points from a curated AI digest.
